100 Years Ago Today, This is What Was Happening ...

On March 16, 1926, the British Parliament debated the ongoing crisis in India, where tensions were escalating as nationalist movements sought independence from colonial rule. In the United States, the stock market showed signs of recovery after recent fluctuations, boosting investor confidence. Meanwhile, a significant storm swept through the Midwest, causing disruptions and prompting warnings from meteorologists.
